[+] Execution complete naturally in 44 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 44) ===
x0:    0 | x1:    1 | x2:    1 | x3:    0 | x4: -165 | x5: -1870 | x6: -428 | x7:  131 |

Branch Predictor Stats: 1/1 correct.
